core_mechanism: dispersive parametric coupling between two resonators, in which the instantaneous displacement of one oscillator modulates the resonant frequency of a second high-quality-factor resonator, transducing position into a phase/frequency shift read out interferometrically and bounded by a measurement-imprecision-versus-backaction trade-off
brief_reason: The abstract couples a mechanical beam's position capacitively to the resonant frequency of a microwave cavity to read out its displacement, and frames the result in terms of measurement imprecision and backaction near the standard quantum limit.
